mapper.select: SELECT * FROM long_term_memories WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_type IN ('diary','interview','knowledge','plan') ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO long_term_memories (user_id, content, embedding, source_type, source_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{vecStr}::vector, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, content, source_type, source_id, created_at FROM long_term_memories WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY embedding <=> #{vecStr}::vector LIMIT #{limit}
